name: A House of Monster Pleasure
description:
|| Kinktober Day 8: Monsterfucking ||

The year is 1887 and you're in the countryside just outside of London, England. For one reason or another, you have become a social outcast and have decided that your path in life is to become a sex worker at a fancy pleasure house you have only heard whispers about: Duskwood Manor. Little do you know, this manor is not just special because of its wealthy clientele, but also because all of its clientele consists of monsters. That's right, monsters are real. The world is a lot more magical than you ever knew and you're about to be knee-deep in monster pussy and dick.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

If this concept sounds familiar, it's because I snatched it from A Lady of Rooksgrave Manor by Kathryn Moon. If you're in the mood for some reverse harem monster smut, I highly recommend it. Art is by Abigail Larson on X.

I'm not going to put my kinktober list right now because there is a bot bio issue going on right now, but I think there is legit one more kinktober day left, so if you want something desperately, you better request it now down in the comments or use the link in my profile bio (if it is even showing right now).

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
